goal: Add per-fingertip contact force magnitudes as a GPU-side observation on the Allegro hand using IsaacLab ContactSensorCfg, not a per-step CPU callback.
thoughts: ContactSensorCfg applies PhysicsContactReportAPI under the hood and requires filtered body prims to have PhysicsCollisionAPI — else contacts silently report zero. net_forces_w is a vector per filtered body; magnitude is .norm(dim=-1). root_physx_view.get_link_incoming_joint_force is constraint reaction force, NOT contact, so wrong tool for this task. prim_path glob with '.*_tip' matches all four fingertips across envs.
code:
# 1. Anchor in real IsaacLab contact sensor API
lookup_knowledge(query="IsaacLab ContactSensorCfg net_forces_w history_length track_air_time fingertip")

# 2. Confirm fingertip prims have PhysicsCollisionAPI — required for contact reports
list_all_prims(root="<ROBOT_PRIM_PATH>", schema_filter="PhysicsCollisionAPI", name_contains="tip")

# 3. Dump current APIs on each fingertip to catch missing CollisionAPI
run_usd_script(script="""
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
for name in ['link_3.0_tip','link_7.0_tip','link_11.0_tip','link_15.0_tip']:
    p = stage.GetPrimAtPath(f'<ROBOT_PRIM_PATH>/{name}')
    print(name, 'applied_schemas=', p.GetAppliedSchemas() if p else 'MISSING')
""")

# 4. Wire the sensor cfg and obs term
setup_contact_sensors(
    prim_path_expr="{ENV_REGEX_NS}/Robot/link_.*_tip",
    history_length=<H>,
    track_air_time=False,
    update_period=<DT>
)

# Obs term pseudocode (authored in mdp/observations.py):
# def fingertip_force(env, sensor_cfg: SceneEntityCfg):
#     sensor = env.scene.sensors[sensor_cfg.name]
#     return torch.norm(sensor.data.net_forces_w, dim=-1)  # (N_envs, 4)
failure_modes: Filtered fingertip prim lacks PhysicsCollisionAPI — sensor reports zeros silently
Using root_physx_view.get_link_incoming_joint_force thinking it equals contact force (it is constraint reaction)
Returning raw net_forces_w vector where an obs term expects a scalar magnitude
prim_path without {ENV_REGEX_NS} — sensor fires only on env_0
